name: montezuma_near_death_priority_boost
description: Boost replay priority for near_death transitions in Montezuma where disagreement spikes.
llm_notes: Montezuma shows disagree_near_terminal_rate=0.7436 with mean_entropy=2.3881 and high_conf_disagree_rate=0.3377 over n_steps=267719. Increase sampling of survival-critical transitions to reduce terminal divergence.

name: montezuma_imitation_phase_extend_7000
description: Extend imitation-only phase for Montezuma before RL takeover.
llm_notes: Despite alignment_rate=0.6110, Montezuma remains highly uncertain (mean_entropy=2.3881) and reward_on_disagree (0.5857) exceeds reward_on_agree (0.0520), indicating unstable policy grounding. Extend imitation phase to stabilize action model.

name: frogger_high_conf_disagree_boost
description: Prioritize high-confidence disagreement samples in Frogger to correct confident wrong habits.
llm_notes: Frogger has alignment_rate=0.0289 with high_conf_disagree_rate=0.9711 and disagree_near_terminal_rate=1.0 across n_steps=67771. The agent is confidently wrong at death-adjacent states, so oversample high_conf_disagree transitions.

name: breakout_disagree_priority_boost
description: Increase replay weight for disagreement transitions in Breakout to improve imitation alignment.
llm_notes: Breakout has moderate alignment_rate=0.3691 with high_conf_disagree_rate=0.6309 and disagree_near_terminal_rate=0.5714 over n_steps=12453. A lighter disagreement boost can test whether mismatch reduction improves reward consistency (reward_on_agree=0.0100 vs reward_on_disagree=0.0074).
